Design System v0.29.0
Overview Foundations

Layout

  • App-Shell Layout-Primitive
  • Card Component
  • Divider Component
  • List-Row Component
  • Panel-List Component
  • Section Component

Form

  • Button Component
  • Checkbox + Radio Components
  • Combobox Component
  • Date-Input Component
  • Field Component
  • File-Upload Component
  • OTP Input — One-Time Password / Multi-Field-Code
  • Range-Slider Component
  • Search-Input Component
  • Segmented Control
  • Select Component
  • Slider Component
  • Switch Component

Feedback

  • Alert Component
  • Banner Component
  • Callout Component
  • Empty-State Component
  • Progress Component
  • Skeleton Loader
  • Spinner Component
  • Toast / Notification Component

Navigation

  • Accordion Component
  • Back-to-Top Button
  • Breadcrumbs Component
  • Nav Component
  • Pagination Component
  • Scroll-Spy Navigation
  • Steps Component
  • Tabs Component
  • Tree Component

Overlay

  • Command Palette
  • Drawer Component
  • Hover-Card — Rich Preview on Hover
  • Modal Component
  • Popover Component
  • Tooltip Component

Data Display

  • Avatar Component
  • Avatar-Stack Component
  • Badge Component
  • Chart Container
  • CodeBlock Component
  • Funnel Component
  • Stat Component
  • Table Component
  • Tag Component
  • Timeline Component
  • Trend Component

Primitive

  • Chevron Component
  • Copy Button — Copy-to-Clipboard
  • KBD — Keyboard Shortcut Display
  • Theme Toggle — Light/Dark Mode Switch
Themes Recipes
Layout
  • App-Shell Layout-Primitive
  • Card Component
  • Divider Component
  • List-Row Component
  • Panel-List Component
  • Section Component
Form
  • Button Component
  • Checkbox + Radio Components
  • Combobox Component
  • Date-Input Component
  • Field Component
  • File-Upload Component
  • OTP Input — One-Time Password / Multi-Field-Code
  • Range-Slider Component
  • Search-Input Component
  • Segmented Control
  • Select Component
  • Slider Component
  • Switch Component

  • Alert Component

  • Callout Component
  • Empty-State Component
  • Progress Component

  • Spinner Component
  • Toast / Notification Component

  • Nav Component
  • Pagination Component
  • Scroll-Spy Navigation

  • Tabs Component
  • Tree Component

  • Command Palette
  • Drawer Component
  • Hover-Card — Rich Preview on Hover
  • Modal Component
  • Popover Component
  • Tooltip Component
Data Display
  • Avatar Component
  • Avatar-Stack Component
  • Badge Component
  • Chart Container
  • CodeBlock Component
  • Funnel Component
  • Stat Component
  • Table Component
  • Tag Component
  • Timeline Component
  • Trend Component
Primitive
  • Chevron Component
  • Copy Button — Copy-to-Clipboard
  • KBD — Keyboard Shortcut Display
  • Theme Toggle — Light/Dark Mode Switch
Feedback

Progress Component

Fill-Bar für Usage-Limits, Upload-Status, generische Fortschritts-Anzeigen.

Beispiele

Mit Label-Header

Bookings 45 / 100
…

Tone-Übersicht

Dieselbe Komponente unter allen 6 Tones. Klick auf eine Kachel um die ganze Seite auf diesen Tone zu schalten.

trust
playful
premium
industrial
modern
minimal

Token-Contract

TokenStatusNotiz
--progress-track Optional —
--progress-fill Optional —
--progress-height Optional —
--progress-radius Optional —

Modifier

  • .progress--thin — 0.25rem Höhe
  • .progress--thick — 1rem Höhe
  • .progress--success — / --warning / --danger farbvariante

Modifier-Vorschau

Jeder Modifier auf das Basis-Markup angewandt — visueller Beweis, dass die Klasse funktioniert.

.progress--thin 0.25rem Höhe
.progress--thick 1rem Höhe
.progress--success farbvariante
.progress--warning farbvariante
.progress--danger farbvariante
Source-CSS ansehen
